expectedIssues: Sports icon is missing the the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: Fine print terms and conditions text at the bottom is extremely small and has insufficient contrast, making it nearly impossible to read for users
The 'SCROLL DOWN' element with checkmarks is visually disruptive and appears to break up the content flow unnecessarily in the middle of the page
The two bonus offer boxes (ALL PLAYERS / NEW PLAYERS) are displayed side-by-side in a rigid two-column layout that likely breaks on mobile devices and tablets

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a missing sports icon in the bottom navigation bar; they address text contrast, content flow disruption, and responsive layout issues instead.
